Instructions for deploying a Flask app with an ASGI server using WSGI to ASGI middleware.

# Purpose
The content explains how to configure a Flask application to run on an ASGI server by using WSGI to ASGI middleware. It recommends using the `WsgiToAsgi` adapter from the `asgiref` library, which allows the integration of Flask applications with an event loop for asynchronous support. The process involves wrapping the Flask application with `WsgiToAsgi` to create an `asgi_app`. This `asgi_app` can then be served using an ASGI server, such as Hypercorn, by executing the command `$ hypercorn module:asgi_app`. This setup enables the Flask application to handle asynchronous requests efficiently.
